mapper.select: SELECT r.review_id, r.restaurant_id, r.member_id, m.name AS member_name, r.rating, r.content, r.created_at FROM reviews r JOIN members m ON r.member_id = m.member_id WHERE r.restaurant_id = #{restaurantId} ORDER BY r.review_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reviews ( restaurant_id, member_id, rating, content ) VALUES ( #{restaurantId}, #{memberId}, #{rating}, #{content} )
